TABLE.NAME: su_statboard_daily_stats
TABLE.COMMENT: Daily aggregated login statistics for the SU Statboard API

FIELD.NAME: logins
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of distinct users who logged in on this date

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp when this record was created by the cron

INDEX.NAME: su_statboard_daily_stats_date_ix
INDEX.COMMENT: Unique index on date to prevent duplicate entries

TABLE.NAME: su_statboard_hourly_stats
TABLE.COMMENT: Hourly snapshot of connected users for the SU Statboard API

FIELD.NAME: connections
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of distinct users connected at this hour snapshot

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp when this record was created by the cron

INDEX.NAME: su_statboard_hourly_stats_date_hour_ix
INDEX.COMMENT: Unique index on date+hour to prevent duplicate entries
